responses.question: In a typical week, what is the total number of hours you work across all your roles combined?
How many hours per week do you spend face-to-face (or on calls) with customers — across presales and delivery?
What are the main activities that make up your customer-facing time?
responses.answer:
Project Health Reviews
SIC 
Governance
Pipeline Review
AI Tools and adoption discussion
Innovation 
Dependency Planning

responses.question: How many hours per week do you typically spend on your Cloud Leader responsibilities?
In your Cloud Leader role, what are the top 3 activities where you spend most of your time and feel you add real value?
responses.answer:
Review Pipeline of Projects and Engagement
Team Engagement /Staffing and Planning 
Innovation and Reusability 
Team Readiness
Pipeline Health and Utilisation across projects
Serve as the escalation point for PMs and Technical SPOCs for people/skills issues
AI-native delivery strategy, faster delivery imperative, practice building, innovation governance

responses.question: Still in your Cloud Leader role — what are 2 activities you regularly have to do, but feel are low-value or unproductive?
responses.answer:
Manual follow ups for WSR
Manual follow ups to get information about deactivated/on hold projects from GDC Vs PS

responses.question: What is the single biggest thing that prevents you from spending time on what matters most in your role?
responses.answer: Reactive delivery firefighting - constantly pulled into the operational weeds of individual project problems instead of being freed up for the strategic cloud leadership work. Being relatively new to GDC, governance structures and delivery ownership are still solidifying under me. That gap is naturally getting filled by my own involvement

responses.question: If you could redesign your week, what would you spend significantly more time on — and what would you hand off or stop doing?
responses.answer:
Spend More Time on 
1. AI-Native Delivery Strategy & the Faster Delivery Imperative
2. Practice-building: Innovation & Intake Governance
3. Direct reports' growth & delivery empowerment
4. Customer & stakeholder presence at the right level

HandOff 
1. Operational activities for Project Tracking
